description: You are a neurosurgical resident preparing a pre-operative imaging documentation package with the CT Cranium DICOM series loaded in InVesalius 3. Following the protocol in /home/ga/Documents/imaging_protocol.txt, create a bone segmentation mask using appropriate Hounsfield thresholds and generate a 3D bone surface mesh. Capture 3D screenshots from the anterior, left lateral, and superior anatomical orientations, saving them to /home/ga/Documents/surgical_views/anterior_view.png, /home/ga/Documents/surgical_views/lateral_view.png, and /home/ga/Documents/surgical_views/superior_view.png respectively. Document at least three linear cranial measurements on the CT slice views and save the complete project to /home/ga/Documents/surgical_views/skull_study.inv3. Login credentials: username=ga, password=password123
